title: Arda's Omega Golem
description: A terrifying, hostile titan built for destruction. Survive the Omega Golem—it's not here to protect you.
body:
![Arda's Omega Golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b30bd10d1949f89933a2fccee8e52ebb5083e9d.png)
![Omega Golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98ea8633e6b250f504eb2463f4de3177400caea6_0.webp)
![..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43b6a9098e837658343eb13be6242a12c873947a.png)

### **Arda's Omega Golem**
Arda’s Omega Golem: The Corrupted Titan
The age of the peaceful guardian is over. Arda’s Omega Golem introduces a relentless, hostile powerhouse to your Minecraft world. This isn't the Iron Golem you know—this is a corrupted war machine forged from dark metal and powered by unstable runic energy.

A massive, titan-sized hostile entity available only in Creative Mode. The Omega Golem doesn't protect; it destroys everything with earth-shattering explosions.

![..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43b6a9098e837658343eb13be6242a12c873947a.png)

### **Omega Golem's Features**
### 
**Titan Entity:** The Omega Golem is extremely large compared to normal entities; it is a Titan.

**Loot:** When the Omega Golem dies, it drops a large amount of loot.

**Roaring Animation:** When a player spawns an Omega Golem, it appears with a roaring animation.

**Core Laser:** The Omega Golem can shoot lasers at the player or surrounding entities from its powerful core in its chest.

**Ground Strike:** When the Omega Golem strikes the ground, it creates a massive explosion, burning and sending all surrounding entities flying very high.

**Multi-Hit:** The Omega Golem can hit multiple entities with a single punch.

**Shield Blocking:** The Omega Golem can block shields.

**Defensive Stance:** When its health is low, the Omega Golem can use its hands as a shield to defend itself.

**Summoning:** The Omega Golem can be summoned in survival mode with the Cursed Eye and a spawner.

![..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43b6a9098e837658343eb13be6242a12c873947a.png)

### **Versions**
- Neoforge 1.21.1

![..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43b6a9098e837658343eb13be6242a12c873947a.png)
